meaning: v.尖声叫,尖声喊叫n.尖叫声,喊叫声
examples: I thought I heard a scream.
Lou prattled on about various trivialities till I wanted to scream.
Every day 900 million people haggle, gossip, flirt, laugh, scream and cry on a Nokia.
And I totally get that they make clients want to scream and pull out their hair.
